runTitle: Cloud Run Trace Link Recovery - Monitoring Trace URL Restored
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run ai-engine revision rollout (ai-engine-00260-qn8, 100% traffic)
Langfuse htmlPath + traceUrl + apiUrl exposure via monitoring payload
skippedSurfaces: fresh feedback generation (used retained traceId c92418ce-c612-4889-af61-7ee54c96f47a from QA-20260322-0153)
Vercel frontend feedback button flow (already covered in QA-20260322-0153)

expertAssessments.rationale: Stale Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00259-fpw(version=1e6aa6dc2, 2026-03-17)을 ai-engine-00260-qn8(version=1cd337067)로 교체한 뒤, 동일 traceId 조회에서 htmlPath, traceUrl, apiUrl가 모두 복구됨을 직접 확인했다.

notes: Cloud Run latestReadyRevisionName changed to ai-engine-00260-qn8 and is serving 100% traffic.
Deploy summary reported version 1cd337067 with health check HTTP 200.
Authenticated /monitoring/traces?q=c92418ce-c612-4889-af61-7ee54c96f47a&limit=5&includeAuxiliary=true returned count=1 and now exposes htmlPath, traceUrl, and apiUrl.

Root cause was deployment drift: production Cloud Run was still serving revision ai-engine-00259-fpw(version=1e6aa6dc2) from 2026-03-17 even though main already contained feat(observability): expose langfuse trace links in monitoring.

links.label: Cloud Run monitoring trace lookup after ai-engine redeploy
